summary: Matched and linked the item translation unit src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c by changing configure.py from NonMatching to Matching and reshaping itdosei.c helpers, rotation calls, item access, local ordering, and one function order. Bot report records one new match for itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim and linked-code/data progress.

key_files.role: Build configuration changed itdosei.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Main decomp source edited to match/link the Dosei item TU.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: helper rewrites, PAD_STACK removals, JObj rotation helper use, gobj->user_data substitutions, sdata2_ordering addition

what_changed.text: configure.py now treats melee/it/items/itdosei.c as a Matching object instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor individual items hunk

what_changed.text: itdosei.c removed placeholder/platform and some unused includes, added it/itgroundcoll.h, and retained math and baselib/random includes.
Added a static sdata2_ordering function using volatile float/double literals including 1.0f, 0.5f, 0.0f, M_PI_2, M_PI/4, M_PI, 4503601774854144.0, and 60.0f.
Replaced raw expanded jobj rotation setter/assert bodies with calls to HSD_JObjSetRotationXWithMtxDirty, HSD_JObjSetRotationYWithMtxDirty, and HSD_JObjSetRotationZWithMtxDirty in new helper shapes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal of itDosei_SetRotX/Y/Z expanded assert helpers

what_changed.text: Split facing-angle calculation into itDosei_FacingAngle returning an f32, with callers explicitly applying HSD_JObjSetRotationY or HSD_JObjSetRotationYWithMtxDirty.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated replacement of itDosei_SetFacingAngle calls

what_changed.text: Removed several PAD_STACK calls from animation/collision/setup functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK removals in itDosei_UnkMotion0_Anim, it_802817A0, itDosei_UnkMotion2_Anim, itDosei_UnkMotion2_Coll, itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim, it_80282DE4, itDosei_UnkMotion9_Coll

what_changed.text: Changed some item pointer recovery from GET_ITEM(gobj) to gobj->user_data in picked-up, dropped, motion9 anim, and damage-received paths.
Moved itDosei_UnkMotion10_Phys and itDosei_UnkMotion10_Coll after itDosei_UnkMotion10_Anim without changing their bodies.

smart_moves.text: Used configure.py linkage update only after source changes and bot report evidence showed linked-code progress for the item TU.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot linked code +10624 bytes

smart_moves.text: Reduced expanded jobj setter/assert code into existing HSD_JObjSetRotation*WithMtxDirty helper calls where the diff shows the same rotation-axis intent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: expanded itDosei_SetRotX/Y/Z removals and WithMtxDirty call additions

smart_moves.text: Isolated facing-angle math into a small helper so call sites could vary between ordinary rotation setters and WithMtxDirty setters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itDosei_FacingAngle helper and multiple caller replacements

decomp_lessons.lesson: When expanded jobj rotation setters with jobj.h asserts appear in generated code, try replacing them with existing HSD_JObjSetRotation*WithMtxDirty helpers before preserving manual assert/set/dirty blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal of manual itDosei_SetRotX/Y/Z assert bodies
raw_diff: addition of HSD_JObjSetRotationZeroWithMtxDirty and WithMtxDirty axis calls

decomp_lessons.lesson: Separating a repeated computed angle from its side-effecting setter can make call sites easier to match when some callers require normal setters and others require mtx-dirty setter variants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itDosei_FacingAngle added and used with HSD_JObjSetRotationY and HSD_JObjSetRotationYWithMtxDirty

decomp_lessons.lesson: PAD_STACK removals can be part of final matching cleanup when helper shapes, declaration order, or call forms are improved enough to no longer need padding.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot reports itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim 100.00% and configure linked progress

naming_conventions.text: New local helpers keep the file prefix itDosei_ for Dosei-specific logic, e.g. itDosei_FacingAngle, itDosei_UnkMotion4_GetAnimSpeed, and itDosei_UnkMotion4_GetAttrs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new static inline helper declarations

naming_conventions.text: Short local item and jobj names such as ip, item, obj, and jobj remain in use where roles are clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item* ip, HSD_JObj* jobj, Item* item, HSD_JObj* obj declarations

naming_conventions.text: Unrecovered semantic fields remain address/unknown-style, such as xDD4_itemVar.dosei.xDE4, xDF0, unk0, unk8, and unkC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unchanged field/member names in itdosei.c hunks

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed the object classification from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py to link the now-matching TU.
Introduced volatile-literal sdata2_ordering to influence or preserve .sdata2 ordering.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static f32 sdata2_ordering with volatile literals
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is a data-ordering tactic; PR evidence shows it was used and improved .sdata2, but does not explain ownership or whether it should be generalized.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used existing HSD_JObjSetRotation*WithMtxDirty helpers instead of manual inline assert/set/dirty code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: manual rotation helper removals and helper call additions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added narrow inline wrappers for attr access and anim speed in itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim.
Used a suspicious empty nested NULL-check block marked by the author comment 'permuterslop' in itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: // permuterslop and nested if (jobj == NULL) blocks
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The diff supports this as a matching artifact, not as a reusable style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reordered motion10 Phys/Coll after motion10 Anim while keeping their bodies equivalent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal and re-addition of itDosei_UnkMotion10_Phys/Coll around itDosei_UnkMotion10_Anim

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the loaded slice.

Automated report recorded matched code +572 bytes, linked code +10624 bytes, linked data +320 bytes, one new match for main/melee/it/items/itdosei::itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim, and .sdata2 improvement from 87.50% to 96.30%.

Search for 'permuterslop' to identify cleanup candidates or accepted matching artifacts
Search item TUs for HSD_JObjSetRotation*WithMtxDirty helper patterns

Search later changes to src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c for cleanup of gobj->user_data versus GET_ITEM

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use existing JObj rotation helpers instead of preserving expanded jobj.h assert/set/dirty blocks
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2611, manual expanded JObj rotation setter helpers with jobj.h asserts were replaced by HSD_JObjSetRotation*WithMtxDirty helper calls, contributing to a matched/linked itdosei.c update.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetRotationZeroWithMtxDirty and axis WithMtxDirty calls added
text_corpus.jsonl: bot reports one new match for itDosei_UnkMotion4_Anim

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split computation helpers from setter side effects when call sites need different helper variants
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2611 replaced side-effecting facing-angle helpers with itDosei_FacingAngle returning the computed angle, then applied either HSD_JObjSetRotationY or HSD_JObjSetRotationYWithMtxDirty at call sites.

source_update_candidates.title: itdosei.c became a Matching item object in configure.py
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2611 changed configure.py so melee/it/items/itdosei.c is built as Object(Matching, ...) instead of Object(NonMatching, ...).
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source/path status fact from the PR and may belong in path facts if current source confirms it remains true.

source_update_candidates.title: Remaining item decomp counts stated by PR author
source_update_candidates.text: PR body states: Remaining item TUs: 18; Remaining item functions: 63.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Remaining item TUs: 18; Remaining item functions: 63
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be useful as a historical progress datum, but should not be treated as current status without curator validation.

source_update_candidates.title: Caution on volatile literal ordering helpers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2611 used a volatile sdata2_ordering helper and bot report showed .sdata2 improvement, but the slice does not explain ownership. Consider documenting that such helpers are data-order tactics requiring explicit evidence and cleanup review, not default style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already warn about data/literal ownership and matching tactics; this PR provides a concrete example but weak explanatory evidence.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote the empty nested NULL-check block labeled 'permuterslop' as a reusable technique; evidence supports only that it appeared in this PR's matching source.
Do not infer reviewer approval of specific tactics from merge alone; the loaded slice has no human review comments.
Do not generalize gobj->user_data over GET_ITEM from this PR alone; the diff shows substitutions but no rationale.
